commits: 45d3c17 - bober(sprint-5): bober chat hub + scoped /priority and /decide slash commands
filesChanged: src/teams/registry.ts (modified — inline 'hub' team branch in loadTeam, memoryNamespace 'hub')
src/chat/slash-commands.ts (modified — priorityHandler/decideHandler as optional params 10/11 + /priority+/decide cases; HELP_TEXT unchanged)
src/chat/chat-session.ts (modified — handleHubPriority/handleHubDecide/rankAndRenderHub gated on memoryNamespace==='hub', uses this.llm)
notes: Hub team registered inline in loadTeam (mirrors medical branch), memoryNamespace 'hub', no guardrails, no new deps. /priority + /decide added as LAST two optional dispatch params (positions 10/11) — existing positional callers back-compatible. HELP_TEXT byte-identical (new commands intentionally NOT in /help to satisfy sc-5-4). Gate = this.memoryNamespace==='hub'; non-hub teams get informative no-op, ThrowingClient confirms no LLM call. Judge client = this.llm (injected via ChatSessionOptions, never a fresh createClient) so tests run offline. priority.md write best-effort try/catch (missing vault never breaks the turn). 293 tests green (chat 194 + teams + hub); typecheck/build/lint clean.
